name: ghost-agent-workflow
description: Codex skills for versioned parallel planning, profile-bound child thread coordination, scoped workers, and safe Git commits.

interface.shortDescription: Plan parallel work, coordinate scoped child threads, and commit safely.
interface.longDescription: Packages parallel-task-planner, thread-coordination, thread-goal-worker, and git-commit. Parallel execution flows through versioned v2 plans, each Codex module runs in a retained user-visible child thread on the current local workspace with its requested profile, workers remain inside scoped goals, and reviewed changes are committed in the required order.
defaultPrompt: Use $parallel-task-planner to generate a v2 parallel plan with complete child-thread worker profiles.
Use $thread-coordination to execute an explicitly authorized validated v2 plan path with retained Codex child threads.
Use $thread-goal-worker for one scoped module bound to a child thread by the coordinator.
Use $git-commit to analyze current changes and commit them.
